item.title: ExxonMobil to supply LNG to South Africa in milestone deal
item.description: Supermajor signs heads of agreement with owners of planned import terminal in Richard's Bay

item.title: First laden oil tankers leave Iran as US blockade shows signs of softening
item.description: Iranian sources and vessel trackers suggest a growing number of vessels are going in and out of the Islamic Republic

item.title: Equinor outlines FID plans for next greenfield projects
item.description: Projects in Canada, Norway and Angola are planned for FID

item.title: Transocean wins contracts for two harsh environment semisubs
item.description: Awards add about $185 million to backlog

item.title: Spanish contractor wins two Middle East contracts
item.description: Tecnicas Reunidas says the awards came from a national oil company in the region

item.title: Spanish contractor wins two Middle East awards
item.description: Tecnicas Reunidas says the awards came from a national oil company in the region

item.title: Shell drills sidetrack on 'promising' Merlin oil discovery in Namibia
item.description: Supermajor gathers more data on find located in Coniacian play

item.title: Angolan gas to fore as Kwanza basin returns to spotlight
item.description: Matt Tyrrell of Trois Geoconsulting explains increased interest in Angolan gas potential

item.title: Repsol enters agreement to explore new area in Venezuela
item.description: Spanish company to assess potential development of Horcon area

item.title: Shell signs deal with Venezuela for 7 Tcf natural gas development
item.description: Agreement will also assist production at the cross-border Dragon field offshore Trinidad & Tobago

item.title: 'Well positioned': Chevron exploration portfolio targets potential play dominance
item.description: Kevin McLachlan, the US supermajor's vice president of exploration, discusses strategy with Upstream

item.title: Sable Offshore seeks refinancing deal amid legal woes
item.description: The company is looking to replace debt owed to ExxonMobil as it fights lawsuits in California

item.title: Carbon transport infrastructure is missing link in scaling Europe’s CCS, says new report
item.description: European carbon capture targets depend on infrastructure to move CO2 that does not yet exist

item.title: Equinor enters Angola block in heart of Congo basin
item.description: Multiple exploration wells have been drilled on acreage, but nothing commercial has been found

item.title: ExxonMobil targets 35-well campaign in Guyana’s Stabroek block
item.description: Company already producing close to 1 million bpd in area

item.title: Equinor boosts buy-back and production forecast
item.description: Norwegian energy giant holds Capital Markets Day in New York

item.title: Petrobras eyes potential FLNG solution for pre-salt cluster
item.description: Alternative would be on top of three existing gas pipelines in Brazil's main producing play

item.title: Talisman Energy founder Buckee dies — tributes flow in
item.description: Renowned for his sharp intellect and passion for the cosmos, Buckee had a rough ride for taking Talisman into war-torn Sudan

item.title: Deepwater driller well placed for more rewards in Norway
item.description: COSL Drilling Europe has four semi-submersibles working in Norway

item.title: Libya signs bid round exploration contracts
item.description: Signatures put on first batch of production sharing agreements

item.title: Era of energy chokepoints is ending
item.description: Alan Duncan is a former oil trader and UK Foreign Minister, and is currently a senior advisor at Highgate, with 30 years of energy experience in the Middle East

item.title: High fives all round as Chevron boosts Mediterranean portfolio
item.description: Chevron adds a fifth exploration block to its Greece portfolio

item.title: Industry bullish on meeting red-hot FPSO demand
item.description: Four industry experts discuss demand, complexities, gas FPSOs and whether to redeploy

item.title: Escalating strike action at Ichthys LNG could see production shut in
item.description: Unionised workers extend work to rule, with LNG and condensate loadings impacted

item.title: Adnoc evaluating commercial bids for gas project prize
item.description: At least three contractors still in the race for Waset job

item.title: Full steam ahead at Malaysian offshore CCS project
item.description: Geophysical site survey imminent at Duyong field

item.title: Slow return to normal expected after US-Iran deal, analysts say
item.description: US and Iran to sign framework agreement on Friday to end Middle East war and reopen Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Petrobras seeks ion battery technologies for subsea applications
item.description: Potential use of lithium-ion and sodium-ion batteries to be analysed in Brazil

item.title: Vaalco reports 'impressive' production from Gabon well
item.description: Ebouri field probe flowed 8000 bpd during initial tests

item.title: TotalEnergies: Talks to return massive German offshore wind site have failed so far
item.description: French oil and gas major in 2024 pledged to pay German state $2.3 billion for right to build and operate North Sea offshore wind farm
